title: Senior Financial Analyst - Fyers South Asia Partners - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Fyers South Asia Partners - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Fyers South Asia Partners in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Fyers South Asia Partners:
Fyers South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fyers South Asia Partners!
